speaker: Royal Advisor
text: Welcome to the Capital, {{name}}. His Majesty awaits your arrival.

speaker: Royal Advisor
text: Your Majesty... the prophecy has finally begun.

speaker: Royal Advisor
text: For generations, we have awaited the one destined to defeat the Dark Lord.

speaker: Narrator
text: What kind of hero will you become?

speaker: Narrator
text: You believe every life is worth saving.

speaker: Narrator
text: You believe difficult sacrifices are necessary.

speaker: Narrator
text: Before your journey begins... tell us your name.
